title: Ashen Age
description: The Ash Age is not the beginning, not the end. This is the time between. Where everything is burned out, but not yet forgotten.
body:
You wake up in a world where everything has already happened. The ashes have settled. The water is cloudy. Trees are like shadows of the past.
There is no magic here except fire. There is no progress except memory.
Ashen Age is a build for those who are looking not for victory, but for meaning.
Survival here is not about mechanics. This is philosophy.
You are not a hero. You are a witness. And if you survive, you will change.

# 🎯MODPACK
Ashen Age is a Minecraft build about survival in a world that has already experienced its catastrophe.
You are not a hero. You are a witness.
There is no magic here except fire. There is no progress except memory.
Every night is an exam. Every morning is a chance.
You learn to live, not to win.

# 🧩 Core Feature
🌿 Realism & Survival
You don’t just play—you endure.

• 	Body Temperature & Climate (Tough As Nails)
Stay warm or cool depending on the season. Hypothermia and heatstroke are real threats.

• 	Thirst & Fatigue (Simple Difficulty)
Water is a resource, not a background detail. Fatigue builds up—you can’t sprint forever.

• 	Seasons & Crop Cycles (Serene Seasons)
Spring brings growth, autumn harvest, winter starvation. Biomes shift with time.

• 	Diseases & Infections (Simple Difficulty)
Dirty water, dampness, bites—all can make you sick. Healing takes effort.

🔥 Atmosphere & Sound
The world speaks—if you listen.

• 	Dynamic Soundscapes (Sound Physics Remastered)
Echoes in caves, muffled footsteps in snow, wind in the trees—everything sounds alive.

• 	Weather Effects (Better Weather, Dynamic Surroundings)
Storms, blizzards, fog, lightning—not just visual, but gameplay-affecting.

• 	Light & Darkness (Complementary Reimagined Shader)
Light means safety. Without it, you’re prey.


🧱 Slow Progression
You’re not a hero. You’re a craftsman.

• 	Campfires as Life Centers (Campfire Overhaul)
Cooking, warmth, light—everything revolves around fire. It’s your home.

• 	Cooking & Crafting (Farmer’s Delight)
Food takes time, ingredients, and care. Fast food is rare.

• 	Soulful Building (Supplementaries, Create Deco)
Ropes, lanterns, signs, vintage blocks—you build not a base, but a refuge.

🧟‍♂️ Post-Collapse World
You live among ruins.

• 	Abandoned Structures (Immersive Structures)
Ruins, homes, crypts—each with a story. You’re not the first to be here.

• 	Undead & Darkness (Graveyard Mod)
Grim biomes, tombs, spirits—not enemies, but reminders.

• 	Limited Fast Travel (Waystones)
Teleportation is rare. You walk. You feel the journey.

🧘‍♂️ Visual Style & Interface
The world doesn’t shout—it whispers.

• 	Stay True — gentle, soulful textures

• 	Dark GUI — survival-themed interface

• 	Epic Sounds — nature, footsteps, wind

• 	Sildur’s Enhanced Default — lightweight, atmospheric shader


🧠 More ideas for features

• Quests via datapack: not “kill 10 zombies”, but “survive 3 nights without fire”

• Player's Log: Survival entries like a diary

• Memory system: the more you live, the more you learn (via advancements)

<details>
<summary>List of mods</summary>

🌿 Атмосфера и реализм

• 	Seasons — смена времён года

• 	Serene Seasons — влияет на урожай и биомы

• 	Tough As Nails — температура, жажда, выживание

• 	Dynamic Surroundings — звуки, погода, туман

• 	Better Weather — штормы, метели, жара

🧱 Геймплей и выживание

• 	Farmer’s Delight — еда, готовка, уют

• 	Simple Difficulty — усталость, болезни

• 	Campfire Overhaul — костры как центр жизни

• 	Immersive Structures — заброшенные дома, руины

• 	Graveyard Mod — мрачные биомы, склепы, нежить

🧠 Атмосферные дополнения

• 	Supplementaries — детали, лампы, верёвки

• 	Create Deco — винтажные блоки

• 	Waystones — редкие точки перемещения

• 	Sound Physics Remastered — реалистичная акустика


## 🎨 Шейдеры и ресурспаки

🔦 Шейдеры

• 	Complementary Reimagined — мягкий свет, туман, реализм

• 	Sildur’s Enhanced Default — лёгкий, стабильный, атмосферный

🧵 Ресурспаки

• 	Stay True — текстуры с душой

• 	Vanilla Tweaks — мелкие улучшения

• 	Dark GUI — интерфейс в стиле выживания

• 	Epic Sounds — звуки природы, шагов, ветра

</details>
